title: valantia verna
intro: Valantia verna, also known as lesser valerian or early valerian, is a perennial flowering plant in the valerian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Valantia verna include its ability to help with anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. Valantia verna can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in capsule or tablet form, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
